item.title: 郭主播的“三张面孔” | 郭主播的“三张面孔”
item.description:
纽卡墨菲7

发表于在现代上，“网络”这这正在迅猛迅猛发展。而形形色色形形色色主播主播中中中中中中中中中中中中中中中中中中中可谓谓谓是是一：在在：在在在在在在为为为为郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体郭媒体很多的却是以其“三张面孔”着称：一人千面的“戏精主播”、博人眼球的“炫富主播”和大发粉丝财的“淘宝主播”。郭粉更像是自称“小”蚂蚁”，以无脑刷“666”名声在外。

一旦暂停，niurkamurphy7 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，niurkamurphy7 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，niurkamurphy7 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 niurkamurphy7 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 niurkamurphy7 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 niurkamurphy7 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

NiurkaMurphy7

Posted on Dec 2

在现代社交媒体上，“网络主播”这一行业正在迅猛发展。而在形形色色的主播中，郭文贵可谓是一股泥石流：在名为“郭媒体”的直播间里，他自称“战神”，更多的却是以其“三张面孔”著称：一人千面的“戏精主播”、博人眼球的“炫富主播”和大发粉丝财的“淘宝主播”。郭粉更是自称“小蚂蚁”，以无脑刷“666”名声在外。

Once suspended, niurkamurphy7 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, niurkamurphy7 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by niurkamurphy7 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If niurkamurphy7 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag niurkamurphy7:

niurkamurphy7 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging niurkamurphy7 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: niurkamurphy7

item.title: Gene Kim + The Rise and Fall of DevOps | Gene Kim + DevOps 的兴衰 | Conversations from DevOps Enterprise Summit DevOps 企业峰会的对话 | Gene Kim + The Rise and Fall of DevOps | Conversations from DevOps Enterprise Summit
item.description:
作为节目的第一次，我们带着播客去参加在拉斯维加斯举行的 DevOps 企业峰会。

在 DOES 期间，我们有幸采访了著名研究员、“凤凰计划”和“加速”的作者 Gene Kim。

参加 DOES 的还有播客 Bryan 和 Dana Finster 的朋友，他们关于 DevOps 兴衰的演讲启发了我们邀请他们加入播客。

听这个分为两部分的剧集，因为 Gene 对 DevOps 过去、现在和未来的所有事情进行了分解，而 Finsters 则介绍了他们的平台团队、项目所有权以及如何赢得信任以凝聚优秀开发团队的案例。

吉恩·金剧集亮点：

  • 想要将代码审查时间最多缩短 40%？ 自动将估计的审查时间添加到请求请求中！

    在审查了 2,000 个开发团队的工作后，LinearB 的工程师和数据科学家发现，拾取时间和代码审查比应有的时间长了 4 到 5 天。

    好消息是，他们发现这些延迟可以通过为拉取请求增加估计的审查时间而在很大程度上消除！

    在此处详细了解 gitStream 如何让编码变得更好。

一旦暂停，linearb 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，linearb 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，linearb 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 linearb 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 linearb 的操作：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 linearb 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Dev Interrupted takes a detour to Vegas!

In a first for the show, we took the podcast on the road to attend the DevOps Enterprise Summit in Las Vegas.

While at DOES, we had the pleasure of interviewing Gene Kim, famed researcher and author of "The Phoenix Project" and "Accelerate".

Also attending DOES were friends of the podcast Bryan and Dana Finster, whose presentation on the Rise and Fall of DevOps inspired us to invite them onto the pod.

Listen to this two-part episode as Gene breaks down all things DevOps past, present and future, while the Finsters present their case for platform teams, project ownership and how to win the trust that binds good dev teams.

Gene Kim Episode Highlights:

  • (2:12) Improvements Gene is most proud of
  • (4:49) Current industry trends
  • (6:36) What developer experience (DX) means to Gene
  • (8:40) Changing merging behavior
  • (11:09) Enabling enterprise transformations
  • (14:06) Best of DevOps Enterprise Summit

Rise and Fall of DevOps Episode Highlights:

  • (15:50) Episode start
  • (17:59) Defining DevOps
  • (23:46) Mission
  • (26:43) Structure
  • (33:04) Ownership
  • (37:48) Platform
  • (40:55) Learning
  • (45:10) Trust

Want to cut code-review time by up to 40%? Add estimated review time to pull requests automatically!

gitStream is the free dev tool from LinearB that eliminates the No. 1 bottleneck in your team’s workflow: pull requests and code reviews. After reviewing the work of 2,000 dev teams, LinearB’s engineers and data scientists found that pickup times and code review were lasting 4 to 5 days longer than they should be.

The good news is that they found these delays could be eliminated largely by adding estimated review time to pull requests!

Learn more about how gitStream is making coding better HERE.

Citrusbug Technolabs - Nov 2

Once suspended, linearb will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, linearb will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by linearb will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If linearb is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag linearb:

linearb consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging linearb will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: conorbronsdon

item.title: 在 macOS M1 上的 Docker 上运行 Azure SQL Edge | Running Azure SQL Edge on Docker on macOS M1
item.description:
发表于但这些芯片基于ARM 架构，而不是其前身广泛使用的 x64，因此，如果我们想在本地运行软件并利用其所有功能，程序应该为 ARM 做好准备。 这也适用于Docker镜像。

不幸的是，截至 2022 年 11 月，Microsoft 尚未发布用于 ARM 处理器的完全成熟的 SQL Server Docker 映像。 我们对于它可以做些什么呢？

进入 Azure SQL Edge

替代方案是Azure SQL Edge ，它是基于 ARM 架构的流行数据库引擎的轻量级版本。 尽管此版本为了在物联网设备上更好地运行而受到限制，但它具有一些附加功能，例如内置机器学习和数据流功能。 让我们看看如何用它运行一个容器。

安装 Docker

有多种安装 Docker 的方法。 我更喜欢从他们的官方网站下载 Docker Desktop。 记得选择Apple Chip版本。

安装完成后，打开 Docker Desktop。 您会看到一个没有容器正在运行的主页。

在容器上运行 Azure SQL Edge

打开您最喜欢的终端并运行以下命令。

 docker run -d --name azuresqledge --cap-add SYS_PTRACE \ -e 'ACCEPT_EULA=1' \ -e 'MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD=Str#ng_Passw#rd' \ -p 57000:1433 \ mcr.microsoft.com/azure-sql-edge

此处需要注意的重要参数：

  • 成功运行这些命令后，再次转到 Docker Desktop，您将看到新创建的容器启动并运行。

    连接到服务器

    为了连接到数据库服务器，下载Azure Data Studio Apple Silicon版本。

    单击“ New Connection并填写详细信息。

    • 连接类型：Microsoft SQL Server
    • 服务器：localhost,57000（其中57000是容器发布的端口）
    • 身份验证类型： SQL 登录
    • 用户名：sa
    • 密码：Str#ng_Passw#rd（你之前设置的密码）
    • 加密：假
    • 信任服务器证书：True

    已成功建立连接！

    创建数据库

    打开一个新的查询窗口并运行以下查询：

     -- Create a new database called 'dev_testdb1' -- Connect to the 'master' database to run this snippet USE master GO -- Create the new database if it does not exist already IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT [ name ] FROM sys . databases WHERE [ name ] = N 'dev_testdb1' ) CREATE DATABASE dev_testdb1 GO

    在左侧，右键单击数据库并单击刷新以查看新创建的数据库。

    最后，再次打开 Docker Desktop，单击容器并转到日志选项卡以确认数据库已在其上创建。


    几乎在底部，可以读取消息Starting up database 'dev_testdb1' 。 出色的！

    就这样！

一旦暂停，cloudx 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，cloudx 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，cloudx 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 cloudx 没有暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 cloudx：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 cloudx 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Nery Brugnoni for Cloud(x);

Posted on Dec 2

In 2020 Apple decided to replace the Intel chipsets with one of their own making, that have been leading performance benchmarks ever since. But these chips are based on the ARM architecture instead of the widespread x64 used by its predecesor so, if we want to run software natively and take advantage of all of its power, programs should be ARM ready. This also goes for Docker images.

Unfortunately, as of November 2022, Microsoft hasn't released yet a fully fledged SQL Server Docker image for ARM processors. What can we do about it?

Enter Azure SQL Edge

The alternative is Azure SQL Edge, a lighter version of the popular database engine based on the ARM architecture. Even though this version is limited in order to run better on IoT devices, it comes with some additional features like built-in machine learning and data streaming capabilities. Let's see how to run a container with it.

Install Docker

There are many ways to install Docker. I prefer downloading Docker Desktop from their official site. Remember to choose the Apple Chip version.

After the installation is done, open Docker Desktop. You'll be welcomed by a home page that shows no containers running.

Running Azure SQL Edge on a container

Open your favorite terminal and run the following command.

docker run -d --name azuresqledge --cap-add SYS_PTRACE \ -e 'ACCEPT_EULA=1' \ -e 'MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD=Str#ng_Passw#rd' \ -p 57000:1433 \
   mcr.microsoft.com/azure-sql-edge

Important parameters to notice here:

  • ACCEPT_EULA: accepts the license agreement.
  • MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD: sets the password for the sa user.
  • p: publishes the container's port to the host, in this case 1433 where SQL runs.
  • name: any name you want to use to identify this container.

After running these commands successfully, go to Docker Desktop again and you'll see the newly created container up and running.

Connecting to the server

In order to connect to the database server, download Azure Data Studio Apple Silicon version.

Click on New Connection and fill in the details.

  • Connection type: Microsoft SQL Server
  • Server: localhost,57000 (where 57000 is the port that the container published)
  • Authentication type: SQL Login
  • User name: sa
  • Password: Str#ng_Passw#rd (the password you set previously)
  • Encrypt: False
  • Trust server certificate: True

The connection has been successfully established!

Creating a database

Open a new query window and run the following query:

-- Create a new database called 'dev_testdb1'
-- Connect to the 'master' database to run this snippet
USE master
GO
-- Create the new database if it does not exist already
IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT [name] FROM sys.databases WHERE [name] = N'dev_testdb1'
) CREATE DATABASE dev_testdb1
GO

On the left side, right click on databases and click on refresh to see the newly created database.

Finally, open Docker Desktop once more, click on the container and go to the logs tab to confirm that the database has been created on it.


Almost at the bottom, the message Starting up database 'dev_testdb1' can be read. Excellent!

That's all!

zakaria chahboun - Sep 23

Once suspended, cloudx will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, cloudx will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by cloudx will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If cloudx is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag cloudx:

cloudx consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging cloudx will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: brugner
